---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for Advanced Scheduler
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: []
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I can't set timezone overrides..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Use Case / Scenario**
Describe how a background timer daemon or AI agent would utilize this feature during runs.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or mock API designs about the feature request here.
